titleStmt.title: SII 29.134: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 134. (A.R. No. B. 626 of 1961-62.) NANDANAVANA(Uppuṇḍa Po), COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in the prākāra of the Mahābalēśvara temple.

It states that mahāpradhana Mallapa-Voḍeya, while governing the Bārakūru-rajya under the orders of the king Harihara II, made a tax free gift of land to Vidyāpuriya Śrīpāda. The gifted land was within the Mahābalēśvarada-sthāna. The details of purpose and grant are lost since the record is damaged.
It is dated Śaka 1312 Śukla, [Jyēshṭha] śu. 5, Sunday corresponding to 1389 A.D., May 30. The month was nija Jyēshṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailō
kya nagarāraṁba mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1312 śukla saṁvatsarada jēṣṭha śudha 5 Ādivāra
svasti śrī madrārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāśe(ṣe)
ge tappuva rāyaragaṁḍa pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima Uttara samudrā
dhipati śrī vīra pratāpa harihara mahārāyara nirūpadi
ṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna mallapavoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu
pālisuva kāladalli vidyāpuriya śrīpādaṁgaḷige sarvvanamasyavā
gi biṭṭa śrī mahābalēśvarada sthānada kaṭi(ṁ)
(da) naṁmiṁda sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dārāpūrvakavāgi
vana sa
mu 100 yaha vana
baḷiya Ūra
completely damaged
ge mallu
Eṟadu koṭarū
pālanayōrmmadhyē dā
vāyō harēti vasuṁdharā
completely damaged
Digital edition of SII 29.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
